creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #6)
> The original makefile had a lot of cruft that needed fixing.
> 
> As the check-qa mentioned, this needed USES=libtool which changed the
> pkg-plist
> The libraries also needed to be stripped (fix taken from databases/xapian)
> 
> I'm sorry to come off harsh, but I'm very experienced yet I always test my
> patches before handing them over, only on the most trivial do I not do that.
> and staging is not trivial.

No sweat, John. Understood.

As to "I thought you were going to use poudriere from now on?"
I'm cobbling an 11 box now. RELENG_9 has [for QA on ports] proven
to be too old, and I desperately need some dev time with clang.
It'll have redports on it as well.

Hopefully, that'll come as good news to you. As I fear I've
tortured you _far_ too greatly already.

Thanks, John. Especially for all your help.

--Chris
